std::vector<DailyTraffic> query_daily_traffic_metrics() {
  // Connect to the database
  auto db = sqlgen::sqlite::Database("test_db.sqlite");
  
  // Execute the query
  auto results = db.query<DailyTrafficView>(
    "SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%d', visit_time) as visit_date, "
    "COUNT(*) as total_visits, "
    "COUNT(DISTINCT url) as unique_pages "
    "FROM PageVisit "
    "GROUP BY visit_date "
    "ORDER BY visit_date"
  );
  
  // Convert to DailyTraffic vector
  std::vector<DailyTraffic> traffic_metrics;
  for (const auto& row : results) {
    traffic_metrics.push_back({
      row.visit_date,
      row.total_visits,
      row.unique_pages
    });
  }
  
  return traffic_metrics;
}

std::vector<ValidatedProfile> trim_and_length_validation() {

    .from<UserProfile>()
    .columns(

      sqlgen::length(sqlgen::trim(sqlgen::column(&UserProfile::name))).as(&ValidatedProfile::name_length),
      sqlgen::length(sqlgen::trim(sqlgen::column(&UserProfile::email))).as(&ValidatedProfile::email_length)
